name: Base44
description: AI-first Backend as a Service (BaaS) platform with AI agents as the core interface. Generates backend logic, APIs, data models, and handles authentication, storage, and integrations autonomously based on natural language specifications.
capabilities: Customizable AI agent behavior via config
notes: AI-driven backend infrastructure designed for autonomous agents to build full-stack applications. Base44 Skills provide structured instruction sets for AI coding agents. Supports custom AI assistants with local JSONC configuration. Optimized for real-time, mobile, headless, and automation use cases.
